name: Chicken and Coconut Milk Soup (Gaeng Com Yam Gai)
recipeIngredient: 1 small chicken, cut into bite-sized pieces (bone-in)
3 stalks lemon grass, bruised and cut into 2-inch lengths
4 to 6 fresh Serrano chillies, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the Thin coconut milk to a boil.
2. Add the chicken pieces, lemon grass, and Laos powder. Reduce heat and simmer until the chicken is tender, about 15 minutes. Do not cover as this will tend to curdle the coconut milk.
3. When the chicken is tender, add the green onions, coriander leaves, and chillies. Bring the heat up just below boiling.
4. Remove from heat, stir in lime juice and fish sauce, and serve.
